This project is provided as-is with no support. Issues may be opened for informational purposes or to help other users, but there is no guarantee they will be read, responded to, or acted upon.

Please do not open issues requesting help with installation, configuration, troubleshooting, or custom changes — these will not be answered.

If you have found a genuine bug, please include:
- What you expected to happen
- What actually happened
- Steps to reproduce
- Python version and operating system
